_meta.description: Dynamic extension of THEME_POOL in generate-prompts.mjs. Never mutate the hardcoded pool — add here only.

themes.name: Storybook Character Design
themes.rationale: Leverages the 'Library/Reading Joy' trend for National Library Week, focusing on creative character development for digital activities.

themes.name: Library Storyland
themes.rationale: This theme aligns with 'National Library Week' and offers a novel angle on reading and imaginative play.

themes.name: Baking Adventures
themes.rationale: A specific focus on kitchen activities and recipes provides a fresh take on 'Food and Cooking' which was too broad.

themes.name: Kindness Garden
themes.rationale: This theme visually ties acts of kindness to nature, making it distinct from general community or kindness challenges.

themes.name: Springtime Rhymes
themes.rationale: Focuses on creative writing and poetry, identified as a content gap beyond general fine motor skill development.

themes.name: Screen-free activities and digital detox
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Nostalgia and Throwback Kid aesthetics
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Skill-building and purposeful learning
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Backyard Micro-Exploration
themes.rationale: This expands on nature themes by focusing on 'tiny worlds' and small creatures, offering a novel angle for discovery beyond general outdoor play.

themes.name: Mother's Day Keepsakes
themes.rationale: Mother's Day is a strong upcoming moment, and printables for handmade gifts or cards are a direct response to rising searches.

themes.name: Insect Architects
themes.rationale: Bugs/Insects are trending, and focusing on their structures (nests, webs, homes) offers a unique, educational, and creative theme.

themes.name: Rainy Day Adventures
themes.rationale: Building on 'Weather Wonders' from competitor analysis, this theme provides specific indoor activities for spring weather, addressing a common parent need.

themes.name: Forest Fairy Homes
themes.rationale: This blends the trending 'Forest/Woodland' theme with a touch of fantasy, encouraging imaginative design and creative play distinct from just animals.

themes.name: Screen-Free Activities
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Cosmic Journeys
themes.rationale: Space exploration is a noted holiday theme (Space Day) and offers rich visual and educational potential not currently in dynamic pools.

themes.name: Enchanted Realms
themes.rationale: Mythical creatures and fantasy worlds inspire creativity and storytelling, filling a gap for imaginative play printables.

themes.name: Weather Wonders
themes.rationale: Activities explaining weather phenomena are engaging and educational, providing a fresh angle for skill-building content.

themes.name: Everyday Heroes
themes.rationale: Exploring community helpers and professions offers relatable learning and imaginative role-play opportunities for young children.

themes.name: Outdoor learning and nature exploration
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Nostalgic and throwback childhood themes
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Quirky May Celebrations
themes.rationale: Competitor analysis identified a gap in dedicated printables for lesser-known May holidays beyond Mother's Day, offering a unique content angle.

themes.name: Global Adventures: Cultural Explorations
themes.rationale: There's a gap in culturally themed printables for the 4-8 age group, allowing for simple, engaging introductions to world traditions.

themes.name: Everyday Explorer: Life Skills & Chores
themes.rationale: Activities that gamify daily routines and skill-building are a content gap, appealing to parents seeking purposeful engagement.

themes.name: Imagination Props: Printable Play Sets
themes.rationale: Printable props for imaginative play scenarios offer a screen-free alternative that encourages creativity without requiring physical craft materials.

themes.name: Weather Wonders: Clouds & Rainbows
themes.rationale: Printables focused on atmospheric phenomena provide engaging, educational content that is not currently saturated in the market.

themes.name: Little Chef Culinary Adventures
themes.rationale: Competitor analysis highlighted 'Little Chef' as a specific new theme idea, aligning with home-based, engaging activities.

themes.name: Inventor's Workshop STEM Exploration
themes.rationale: This theme was identified as a specific new idea in competitor analysis, focusing on building and design challenges.

themes.name: Community Helpers Neighborhood Exploration
themes.rationale: Competitor analysis suggested this theme to encourage imaginative play and learning about local environments.

themes.name: Memorial Day Makers
themes.rationale: Timely for Memorial Day, this theme allows for content focused on gratitude and community without being overly somber.

themes.name: Summer Road Trip Readiness
themes.rationale: Aligns with rising searches for 'summer activities for kids' and offers practical, engaging content for travel preparation.
